title: SQL select error
poc: create table tst( a0 int unique, a1 int);
select * from tst where a1>=0 and a1 <=3;
create table tst2( b0 int unique, b1 int);
select * from tst2 where b0>=0 and b1<=3;
key_bug_features: select statement with nil values in parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value >= 5 AND value <= 15;
